title: Reach approve-and-action operating model
description: Matthew reviews and approves AI-prepared work each morning. OpenClaw executes everything approved. Matthew spends time on customers, product, and thinking — not research, drafting, or admin. Target: 80% of daily operational work executed by agents without Matthew initiating it.

title: Customer conversations this week
description: Time freed by automation should go here. Direct conversations with potential Sonesse buyers and Nth Layer clients. Goal: replace research time with human time.

title: Hours saved on repetitive work per week
description: OpenClaw automation removes: manual prospecting, inbox triage, content writing, reporting, CRM updates. Time reclaimed goes to customers, product, fundraising.

title: Outreach messages drafted per week
description: Founder outreach engine — personalised LinkedIn/email messages ready to send, comment responses, follow-ups tied to signals. You decide and send.

title: New qualified prospects per week
description: Prospect discovery engine — Apollo + LinkedIn ICP matches, enriched with company size, tech stack, hiring roles, funding. Ranked by buying likelihood.

title: Signals actioned per week
description: Market and signal monitoring — LinkedIn posts, funding rounds, competitor moves, hiring spikes. Each signal should generate an outreach trigger or product idea.

title: 10 Hot Leads for Sonesse
description: Sonesse is an integration layer for conversational AI vendors (video/audio/chat) into Zoom and Microsoft Teams

title: Close a Nth Layer Deal
description: Nth Layer is Matthew's consulting company — close at least one deal this quarter
